name: Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until well combined. Add vanilla and mix in.
2. Gradually add flour to the mixture, stirring until a dough forms.
3. Chill the dough for one hour.
4. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Pinch off a piece of dough and roll it into a ball using your hands. Flatten slightly so the center is not raised.
6. Place a Hershey's kiss in the center of each flattened piece of dough.
7. Gather up the dough around the kiss, shaping it to completely cover the candy.
8. Place the shaped cookies about one inch apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
9. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until lightly browned.
10. Allow the cookies to cool slightly before rolling in confectioner's sugar.
